headings.text: Family Dentistry Treatments at AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, Bellevue, WA
Comprehensive Dental Care for Every Stage of Life
Preventive Care: The Cornerstone of Family Dentistry
Restorative Solutions for a Healthy Smile

paragraphs: Family dentistry offers complete and convenient oral healthcare for patients of all ages, from young children to seniors. At AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, we provide a single, trusted dental home for your entire family. Our focus is on gentle, personalized care designed to keep teeth and gums healthy through every stage of life. We are here to support your family with everything from routine checkups to preventive and restorative treatments.
A person’s dental needs change significantly over time. A family dentist understands this evolution and provides appropriate care for each milestone.

Having one dental office for the whole family builds a long-term relationship based on trust. We become familiar with your family’s dental history, allowing for more consistent and personalized care without the need to transfer records.
The most effective way to ensure lifelong oral health is through prevention. Our goal is to identify and address potential issues before they become serious problems.
Our preventive services include:
These simple steps can save your family time, discomfort, and money in the long run.
When a dental problem does occur, our team offers a full range of restorative solutions to repair damage and restore function. We provide treatments tailored for every age group.
Positive dental experiences during childhood can lead to a lifetime of good oral health habits. We are dedicated to making dental visits feel normal and easy for our youngest patients.
In our patient and gentle environment, children learn the importance of these habits:
Our team works to ensure children feel safe and supported so that they can be proud of their healthy smiles.
Clara H. Song, DDS

Dr. Clara Song, the founder of AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, provides gentle and welcoming dental care to patients in Bellevue and Kirkland. After earning her Doctor of Dental Surgery from Loma Linda University, she completed advanced training at the prestigious Las Vegas Institute for Advanced Dental Studies. Dr. Song moved to Bellevue in 2007 to establish a practice centered on a friendly environment and compassionate care.

Dr. Eric Kim earned his dental degree from Loma Linda University after studying General Biology at the University of Washington. He is dedicated to providing high-quality, gentle care and stays current with the latest advancements in dentistry. Dr. Kim shares Dr. Song’s commitment to excellent treatment and patient comfort.
We are committed to helping you receive the dental care you need, with or without insurance. Our office accepts a variety of payment options:
We also work with many insurance providers. Please call our office to learn more about your payment and insurance options.
Schedule Your Checkup Today
Experience trusted, gentle dental care for every member of your family.

AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry
11216 NE 15th St Suite A
Bellevue WA 98004
(425) 454-3221
